test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-1
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: Malformed JWT because vct#integrity claim is missing

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-2
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: Duplicate JSON keys and conflicting values

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-3
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: EAA doesn't incorporate technical validity period

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-4
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: EAA incorporates both the EAA short-lived component and the EAA status service.

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-5
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: Tampered payload – invalid signature, valid token modified after signing altering a claim

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-6
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: Malformed JWT including wrong elements (wrong typ value)

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-7
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: Expired credential, credential has expired in the past.

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-8
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: Status check unavailable (fail-open vs fail-closed), status service returns 5xx or network outage.

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-9
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: Malformed JWT including wrong elements (wrong field name in payload)

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-10
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description:
JWT – Schema/namespace mismatch, verifier expects a specific schema/namespace; credential uses different one.
1) Present credential with wrong schema identifier or namespace.
2) Verify schema validation behavior.

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-11
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: EAA with a disclosure without having the corresponding digest in the payload. The disclosure may be an object or an element of an array.

test_cases.name: SJV-EAAN-12
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC EAAN
test_cases.description: EAA with some mandatory PID elements not present

test_cases.name: SJV-QEAAN-1
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC QEAAN
test_cases.description:
Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; without key binding; with wrong EAA category that's different from
- urn:etsi:esi:eaa:eu:qualified (QEAA)
- urn:etsi:esi:eaa:eu:pub (Pub-EAA)

test_cases.name: SJV-QEAAN-2
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC QEAAN
test_cases.description: Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; with the issuer identifier fields including an identifier of a non-EU Member State

test_cases.name: SJV-QEAAN-3
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC QEAAN
test_cases.description: Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; without the issuer identifier fields

test_cases.name: SJV-QEAAN-4
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC QEAAN
test_cases.description:
Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; 
without including either the EAA subject identifier or the pseudonym of the EAA subject.

test_cases.name: SJV-QEAAN-5
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC QEAAN

test_cases.name: SJV-QEAAN-6
test_cases.subtitle: SD-JWT-VC QEAAN

- urn:etsi:esi:eaa:eu:pub (Pub-EAA)

profiles.notes:
NOTES: 
. Test cases incorporating components defined in ETSI TS 119 472-1 clause 6.

. This defines ISO-mdoc QEAA different than mdL
ISO-mdoc QEAA shall be an instance of IssuerSigned type as per section 10.3.3 of ISO 18013-5, clause 8.3.2.1.2.2

test_cases.name: MDL-EAA-1
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdL (ISO-mdoc EAA for mdL)
test_cases.description:
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2 of ISO 18013-5.

. Only mandatory elements in IssuerAuth as per section 9.1.2.4 of ISO 18013-5

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)

test_cases.name: MDL-EAA-2
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdL (ISO-mdoc EAA for mdL)
test_cases.description:
Addition to validityInfo of optional element
EAA-1 +  expectedUpdate child of validityInfo
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2.1 of ISO 18013-5.

. Mandatory  elements in IssuerAuth as per section 12.3.3 of ISO 18013-5.

. validityInfo with expectedUpdate child

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)

test_cases.name: MDL-EAA-3
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdL (ISO-mdoc EAA for mdL)
test_cases.description:
Test cases with  different contents of deviceKeyInfo
EAA-1 + deviceKeyInfo.keyAuthorizations.nameSpaces
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2.1 of ISO 18013-5.

. Mandatory  elements in IssuerAuth as per section 12.3.3 of ISO 18013-5.

. deviceKeyInfo with keyAuthorizations.nameSpaces descendant

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)
   .keyAuthorizations
        .nameSpaces

test_cases.name: MDL-EAA-4
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdL (ISO-mdoc EAA for mdL)
test_cases.description:
Test cases with  different contents of deviceKeyInfo
EAA-1 + deviceKeyInfo.keyAuthorizations.dataElements
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2.1 of ISO 18013-5.

. Mandatory  elements in IssuerAuth as per section 12.3.3 of ISO 18013-5.

. deviceKeyInfo.keyAuthorizations with dataElements child

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)
   .keyAuthorizations
        .dataElements

test_cases.name: MDL-EAA-5
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdL (ISO-mdoc EAA for mdL)
test_cases.description:
Test cases with  different contents of deviceKeyInfo
EAA-1 + deviceKeyInfo.keyAuthorizations
    .dataElements and 
    .nameSpaces
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2.1 of ISO 18013-5.

. Mandatory  elements in IssuerAuth as per section 12.3.3 of ISO 18013-5.

. deviceKeyInfo.keyAuthorizations with nameSpaces and dataElements children

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)
   .keyAuthorizations
        .nameSpaces
        .dataElements

test_cases.name: MDL-EAA-6
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdL (ISO-mdoc EAA for mdL)
test_cases.description:
EAA-1 + MSO.status.identifier_list
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2.1 of ISO 18013-5.

. Mandatory elements in IssuerAuth as per section 12.3.3 of ISO 18013-5

.status.identifier_list

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)

test_cases.name: MDL-EAA-7
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdL (ISO-mdoc EAA for mdL)
test_cases.description:
EAA-1 + Optional elements in section 7.2 of ISO 18013-5
. Mandatory and some Optional elements as per section 7.2.1 of ISO 18013-5.

. Only mandatory elements in IssuerAuth as per section 12.3.3 of ISO 18013-5

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)

test_cases.name: MDOC-EAA-1
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdoc EAA (no mdL)
test_cases.description:
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2 of ISO 18013-5.

. Only mandatory elements in IssuerAuth as per section 9.1.2.4 of ISO 18013-5

. Mandatory components of TS 119 472-1

. Some optional components of TS 119 472-1

sections.title: Payload
items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)

sections.title: NameSpace
items:
namespaces(attributes)
.Namespace(="org.iso.23220.1")
Section 10.3.3; for the components defined there.

.Namespace(="org.etsi.01947201.010101) for elements:
    category
    iss_reg_id
    also_known_as
    oneTime
    status_service
    shortLived
issuing_authority_unicode (as specified in clause 6.3 of ISO/IEC 23220-2)

document_number 
(as specified in section 6.3 of ISO/IEC 23220-2)

test_cases.name: MDOC-EAA-2
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdoc EAA (no mdL)
test_cases.description:
Additions to claims set
MDOC-EAA-1 + iss_reg_id (TS 119 472-1 clause 6.2.4.2).
Issuer:legal entity and registration identifier applicable
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2.1 of ISO 18013-5.

. Mandatory  elements in IssuerAuth as per section 12.3.3 of ISO 18013-5.

. validityInfo with expectedUpdate child

items:
deviceKeyInfo 
    .deviceKey(COSE_Key with public key of wallet)

profiles.notes:
NOTES: 
. Test cases incorporating components defined in ETSI TS 119 472-1 clause 6.

. This defines ISO-mdoc QEAA different than mdL
ISO-mdoc QEAA shall be an instance of IssuerSigned type as per section 10.3.3 of ISO 18013-5, clause 8.3.2.1.2.2

test_cases.name: MDOC-QEAA-1
test_cases.subtitle: ISO-mdoc QEAA (no mdL)
test_cases.description:
. Mandatory elements as per section 7.2 of ISO 18013-5.

. Only mandatory elements in IssuerAuth as per section 9.1.2.4 of ISO 18013-5

. Mandatory components of TS 119 472-1

. Mandatory category component identifying the QEAA as a QEAA

. Some optional components of TS 119 472-1
